revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:October 29 (old lunar calendar)]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of October 29 (old lunar calendar)]]</includeonly>

{{旧暦10月}} '''旧暦10月29日'''は[[旧暦]][[10月 (旧暦)|10月]]の29日目である。年によっては10月の最終日となる。六曜は[[六曜#友引|友引]]である。
== できごと == * [[貞享]]元年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1684年]][[12月5日]]） - [[宣明暦]]を廃止し[[渋川春海]]作成の[[貞享暦]]を採用 * [[享保]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1720年]][[11月28日]]） - [[水戸藩]]が『[[大日本史]]』250巻を幕府へ献上
== 誕生日 == * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]12年（グレゴリオ暦[[1815年]][[11月29日]]） - [[井伊直弼]]、江戸幕府[[大老]]（+ [[1860年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[安永]]8年（グレゴリオ暦[[1779年]][[12月6日]]） - [[後桃園天皇]]、118代[[天皇]]（* [[1758年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
{{旧暦360日}} *前日[[10月28日 (旧暦)|10月28日]] 翌日[[10月30日 (旧暦)|10月30日]] - 前月[[9月29日 (旧暦)|9月29日]] 翌月[[11月29日 (旧暦)|11月29日]] *新暦[[10月29日]]
{{stub}}

{{旧暦10月}} '''旧暦10月29日'''は[[10月 (旧暦)|旧暦10月]]の29日目である。年によっては10月の最終日となる。六曜は[[六曜#友引|友引]]である。
== できごと == <!---* [[貞享]]元年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1684年]][[12月5日]]） - [[宣明暦]]を廃止し[[渋川春海]]作成の[[貞享暦]]を採用---「[[宣明暦]]」「[[貞享暦]]」の記載と矛盾---> * [[享保]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1720年]][[11月28日]]） - [[水戸藩]]が『[[大日本史]]』250巻を幕府へ献上
== 誕生日 == * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]12年（グレゴリオ暦[[1815年]][[11月29日]]） - [[井伊直弼]]、江戸幕府[[大老]]（+ [[1860年]]） * [[天保]]8年（グレゴリオ暦[[1837年]][[11月26日]]） - [[井上正直]]、[[浜松藩]]主（+ [[1904年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[安永]]8年（グレゴリオ暦[[1779年]][[12月6日]]） - [[後桃園天皇]]、118代[[天皇]]（* [[1758年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|10|28|10|30|9|29|11|10|1029}}
[[Category:japanese lunar calendar]][[ja:10月29日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]]

--> == Events == <!---* [[貞享]]元年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1684年]][[12月5日]]） - [[宣明暦]]を廃止し[[渋川春海]]作成の[[貞享暦]]を採用---「[[宣明暦]]」「[[貞享暦]]」の記載と矛盾---> * [[享保]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1720年]][[11月28日]]） - [[水戸藩]]が『[[大日本史]]』250巻を幕府へ献上

[[sn:October 29 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 10월 29일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 29 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月29日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 29일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 29 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月廿九]] [[zh:十月廿九]] [[en:draft:October 29 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar October}} '''October 29''' is the 29th day of month {{ill|October (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. If the month is {{Nihongo|Small|小}} then this is the last day of the month. Otherwise if the month is {{Nihongo|Big|大}} then it is the second last day.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref> It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}}.
== Events == <!--「[[宣明暦]]」「[[貞享暦]]」の記載と矛盾---> * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}}5年（グレゴリオ暦{{ill|1720|ja|1720}}{{ill|November 28|ja|11月28日}}） - {{ill|Mito Domain|ja|水戸藩}}が『{{ill|Dai-Nihon-shi|ja|大日本史}}』250巻を幕府へ献上
== Births == * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)|lt=Bunka|lt_ja=文化}}12年（グレゴリオ暦{{ill|1815|ja|1815}}{{ill|November 29|ja|11月29日}}） - {{ill|Ii Naosuke|ja|井伊直弼}}、江戸幕府{{ill|Tairō|ja|大老}}（+ {{ill|1860|ja|1860}}）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Annin|ja|安永}}8年（グレゴリオ暦{{ill|1779|ja|1779}}{{ill|December 6|ja|12月6日}}） - {{ill|Emperor Go-Taien|ja|後桃園天皇}}、118代{{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇}}（* {{ill|1758|ja|1758}}）
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|28|10|30|9|29|11|10|1029}}

[[sn:October 29 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 10월 29일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 29 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月29日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 29일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 29 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月廿九]] [[zh:十月廿九]] [[en:draft:October 29 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar October}} '''October 29''' is the 29th day of month {{ill|October (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. If the month is {{Nihongo|Small|小}} then this is the last day of the month. Otherwise if the month is {{Nihongo|Big|大}} then it is the second last day.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref> It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}}.

== Births == * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)|lt=Bunka|lt_ja=文化}}12nd year（グレゴリオ暦{{ill|1815|ja|1815}}{{ill|November 29|ja|11月29日}}） - {{ill|Ii Naosuke|ja|井伊直弼}}、江戸幕府{{ill|Tairō|ja|大老}}（+ {{ill|1860|ja|1860}}）

Otherwise if the month is {{Nihongo|Big|大}} then it is the second last day.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref> It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}}.

[[sn:October 29 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 29일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 29 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月29日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 29일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 29 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月廿九]] [[zh:十月廿九]] [[en:draft:October 29 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 29''' is the 29th day of month {{ill|October (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . If the month is {{Nihongo|Small|小}} then this is the last day of the month. Otherwise if the month is {{Nihongo|Big|大}} then it is the second last day.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref> It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == <!--「[[宣明暦]] 」「[[貞享暦]] 」の記載と矛盾---> * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1720|ja|1720}} {{ill|November 28|ja|11月28日}} ） - {{ill|Mito Domain|ja|水戸藩}} が『{{ill|Dai-Nihon-shi|ja|大日本史}} 』250巻を幕府へ献上
== Births == * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)|lt=Bunka|lt_ja=文化}} 12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1815|ja|1815}} {{ill|November 29|ja|11月29日}} ） - {{ill|Ii Naosuke|ja|井伊直弼}} 、江戸幕府{{ill|Tairō|ja|大老}} （+ {{ill|1860|ja|1860}} ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Annin|ja|安永}} 8th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1779|ja|1779}} {{ill|December 6|ja|12月6日}} ） - {{ill|Emperor Go-Taien|ja|後桃園天皇}} 、118代{{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇}} （* {{ill|1758|ja|1758}} ）

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Lunisolar}}" to "{{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}}"
revision.text:
[[sn:October 29 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 29일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 29 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月29日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 29일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 29 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月廿九]] [[zh:十月廿九]] [[en:draft:October 29 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 29''' is the 29th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . If the month is {{Nihongo|Small|小}} then this is the last day of the month. Otherwise if the month is {{Nihongo|Big|大}} then it is the second last day.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref> It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == <!--「[[宣明暦]] 」「[[貞享暦]] 」の記載と矛盾---> * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1720|ja|1720}} {{ill|November 28|ja|11月28日}} ） - {{ill|Mito Domain|ja|水戸藩}} が『{{ill|Dai-Nihon-shi|ja|大日本史}} 』250巻を幕府へ献上
== Births == * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)|lt=Bunka|lt_ja=文化}} 12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1815|ja|1815}} {{ill|November 29|ja|11月29日}} ） - {{ill|Ii Naosuke|ja|井伊直弼}} 、江戸幕府{{ill|Tairō|ja|大老}} （+ {{ill|1860|ja|1860}} ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Annin|ja|安永}} 8th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1779|ja|1779}} {{ill|December 6|ja|12月6日}} ） - {{ill|Emperor Go-Taien|ja|後桃園天皇}} 、118代{{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇}} （* {{ill|1758|ja|1758}} ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|28|10|30|9|29|11|10|1029}}

revision.comment: Fixing the qq replacement as it causes problems in a lot of pages
revision.text:
[[sn:October 29 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 29일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 29 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月29日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 29일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 29 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月廿九]] [[zh:十月廿九]] [[en:draft:October 29 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 29''' is the 29th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . If the month is {{Nihongo|Small|小}} then this is the last day of the month. Otherwise if the month is {{Nihongo|Big|大}} then it is the second last day.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref> It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == <!--「[[宣明暦]] 」「[[貞享暦]] 」の記載と矛盾---> * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1720|ja|1720}} {{ill|November 28|ja|11月28日}} ） - {{ill|Mito Domain|ja|水戸藩}} が『{{ill|Dai-Nihon-shi|ja|大日本史}} 』250巻を幕府へ献上
== Births == * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)|lt=Bunka|lt_ja=文化}} 12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1815|ja|1815}} {{ill|November 29|ja|11月29日}} ） - {{ill|Ii Naosuke|ja|井伊直弼}} 、江戸幕府{{ill|Tairō|ja|大老}} （+ {{ill|1860|ja|1860}} ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Annin|ja|安永}} 8th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1779|ja|1779}} {{ill|December 6|ja|12月6日}} ） - {{ill|Emperor Go-Taien|ja|後桃園天皇}} 、118代{{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇}} （* {{ill|1758|ja|1758}} ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|28|10|30|9|29|11|10|1029}}

[[sn:October 29 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 29일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 29 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月29日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 29일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 29 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月廿九]] [[zh:十月廿九]] [[en:draft:October 29 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 29''' is the 29th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . If the month is {{Nihongo|Small|小}} then this is the last day of the month. Otherwise if the month is {{Nihongo|Big|大}} then it is the second last day.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref> It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == <!--「[[宣明暦]] 」「[[貞享暦]] 」の記載と矛盾---> * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1720|ja|1720}} {{ill|November 28|ja|11月28日}} ） - {{ill|Mito Domain|ja|Mito Domain}} が『{{ill|Dai-Nihon-shi|ja|大日本史}} 』250巻を幕府へ献上
== Births == * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)|lt=Bunka|lt_ja=文化}} 12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1815|ja|1815}} {{ill|November 29|ja|11月29日}} ） - {{ill|Ii Naosuke|ja|井伊直弼}} 、Tokugawa shogunate{{ill|Tairō|ja|大老}} （+ {{ill|1860|ja|1860}} ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Annin|ja|安永}} 8th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1779|ja|1779}} {{ill|December 6|ja|12月6日}} ） - {{ill|Emperor Go-Taien|ja|後桃園天皇}} 、118代{{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇}} （* {{ill|1758|ja|1758}} ）

revision.comment: Text replacement - "== See Also ==" to " == See Also! =="
revision.text:
[[sn:October 29 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 29일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 29 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月29日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 29일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 29 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月廿九]] [[zh:十月廿九]] [[en:draft:October 29 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 29''' is the 29th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . If the month is {{Nihongo|Small|小}} then this is the last day of the month. Otherwise if the month is {{Nihongo|Big|大}} then it is the second last day.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref> It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == <!--「[[宣明暦]] 」「[[貞享暦]] 」の記載と矛盾---> * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1720|ja|1720}} {{ill|November 28|ja|11月28日}} ） - {{ill|Mito Domain|ja|Mito Domain}} が『{{ill|Dai-Nihon-shi|ja|大日本史}} 』250巻を幕府へ献上
== Births == * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)|lt=Bunka|lt_ja=文化}} 12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1815|ja|1815}} {{ill|November 29|ja|11月29日}} ） - {{ill|Ii Naosuke|ja|井伊直弼}} 、Tokugawa shogunate{{ill|Tairō|ja|大老}} （+ {{ill|1860|ja|1860}} ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Annin|ja|安永}} 8th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1779|ja|1779}} {{ill|December 6|ja|12月6日}} ） - {{ill|Emperor Go-Taien|ja|後桃園天皇}} 、118代{{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇}} （* {{ill|1758|ja|1758}} ） == See Also! ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|28|10|30|9|29|11|10|1029}}

[[sn:October 29 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 29일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 29 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月29日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 29일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 29 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月廿九]] [[zh:十月廿九]] [[en:draft:October 29 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 29''' is the 29th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . If the month is {{Nihongo|Small|小}} then this is the last day of the month. Otherwise if the month is {{Nihongo|Big|大}} then it is the second last day.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref> It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == <!--「[[宣明暦]] 」「[[貞享暦]] 」の記載と矛盾---> * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1720|ja|1720}} {{ill|November 28|ja|11月28日}} ） - {{ill|Mito Domain|ja|Mito Domain}} が『{{ill|Dai-Nihon-shi|ja|大日本史}} 』250巻を幕府へ献上
== Births == * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)|lt=Bunka|lt_ja=文化}} 12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1815|ja|1815}} {{ill|November 29|ja|11月29日}} ） - {{ill|Ii Naosuke|ja|井伊直弼}} 、Tokugawa shogunate{{ill|Tairō|ja|大老}} （+ {{ill|1860|ja|1860}} ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Annin|ja|安永}} 8th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1779|ja|1779}} {{ill|December 6|ja|12月6日}} ） - {{ill|Emperor Go-Taien|ja|後桃園天皇}} 、118代{{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇}} （* {{ill|1758|ja|1758}} ）

[[sn:October 29 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 29일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 29 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月29日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 29일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 29 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月廿九]] [[zh:十月廿九]] [[en:draft:October 29 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 29''' is the 29th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . If the month is {{Nihongo|Small|小}} then this is the last day of the month. Otherwise if the month is {{Nihongo|Big|大}} then it is the second last day.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref> It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == <!--「[[宣明暦]] 」「[[貞享暦]] 」の記載と矛盾---> * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1720|ja|1720}} {{ill|November 28|ja|11月28日}} ） - {{ill|Mito Domain|ja|Mito Domain}} が『{{ill|Dai-Nihon-shi|ja|大日本史}} 』250巻を幕府へ献上
== Births == * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)|lt=Bunka|lt_ja=文化}} 12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1815|ja|1815}} {{ill|November 29|ja|11月29日}} ） - {{ill|Ii Naosuke|ja|井伊直弼}} 、Tokugawa shogunate{{ill|Tairō|ja|大老}} （+ {{ill|1860|ja|1860}} ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Annin|ja|安永}} 8th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1779|ja|1779}} {{ill|December 6|ja|12月6日}} ） - {{ill|Emperor Go-Taien|ja|後桃園天皇}} 、118代{{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇}} （* {{ill|1758|ja|1758}} ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|28|10|30|9|29|11|10|1029}}

[[sn:October 29 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 29일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 29 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月29日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 29일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 29 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月廿九]] [[zh:十月廿九]] [[en:draft:October 29 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 29''' is the 29th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . If the month is {{Nihongo|Small|小}} then this is the last day of the month. Otherwise if the month is {{Nihongo|Big|大}} then it is the second last day.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref> It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .

== Births == * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)|lt=Bunka|lt_ja=文化}} 12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1815|ja|1815}} {{ill|November 29|ja|11月29日}} ） - {{ill|Ii Naosuke|ja|井伊直弼}} 、Tokugawa shogunate{{ill|Tairō|ja|大老}} （+ {{ill|1860|ja|1860}} ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Annin|ja|安永}} 8th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1779|ja|1779}} {{ill|December 6|ja|12月6日}} ） - {{ill|Emperor Go-Taien|ja|後桃園天皇}} 、118代{{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇}} （* {{ill|1758|ja|1758}} ）

[[Category:pages to sort]][[cdo:10 nguŏk 29 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 29 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[Category:pages to sort]][[zh-yue:十月廿九]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 29''' is the 29th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} . If the month is {{Nihongo|Small|小}} then this is the last day of the month. Otherwise if the month is {{Nihongo|Big|大}} then it is the second last day.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref> It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Events ==
* {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1720|ja|1720|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 28|ja|11月28日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ） - {{ill|Mito Domain|ja|Mito Domain|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} が『{{ill|Dai-Nihon-shi|ja|大日本史|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 』250巻を幕府へ献上
== Births == * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)|lt=Bunka|lt_ja=文化|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1815|ja|1815|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 29|ja|11月29日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ） - {{ill|Ii Naosuke|ja|井伊直弼|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 、Tokugawa shogunate{{ill|Tairō|ja|大老|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} （+ {{ill|1860|ja|1860|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Annin|ja|安永|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 8th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1779|ja|1779|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|December 6|ja|12月6日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ） - {{ill|Emperor Go-Taien|ja|後桃園天皇|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 、118代{{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} （* {{ill|1758|ja|1758|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ）

Otherwise if the month is {{Nihongo|Big|大}} then it is the second last day.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref> It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Events ==
* {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1720|ja|1720|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 28|ja|11月28日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ） - {{ill|Mito Domain|ja|Mito Domain|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} が『{{ill|Dai-Nihon-shi|ja|大日本史|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 』250巻を幕府へ献上
== Births == * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)|lt=Bunka|lt_ja=文化|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1815|ja|1815|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 29|ja|11月29日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ） - {{ill|Ii Naosuke|ja|井伊直弼|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 、Tokugawa shogunate{{ill|Tairō|ja|大老|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} （+ {{ill|1860|ja|1860|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Annin|ja|安永|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 8th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1779|ja|1779|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|December 6|ja|12月6日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ） - {{ill|Emperor Go-Taien|ja|後桃園天皇|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 、118代{{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} （* {{ill|1758|ja|1758|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ）

revision.text:
{{Not to be confused with|October 29|qq=October 29}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月廿九|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 29일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 29''' is the 29th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . If the month is {{Nihongo|Small|小|qq=}} then this is the last day of the month. Otherwise if the month is {{Nihongo|Big|大|qq=}} then it is the second last day.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref> It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|qq=}} .
== Events ==
* [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1720|ja|1720|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1720|qq=}} [[:en:November 28|November 28]] ） - {{ill|Mito Domain|1=Mito Domain|2=ja|3=水戸藩|ja|Mito Domain|1=Mito Domain|2=ja|3=水戸藩|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mito Domain|qq=}} が『[[:en:Dai Nihonshi|Dai-Nihon-shi]] 』250巻を幕府へ献上
== Births == * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1815|ja|1815|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1815|qq=}} [[:en:November 29|November 29]] ） - [[:en:Ii Naosuke|Ii Naosuke]] 、Tokugawa shogunate[[:en:Tairō|Tairō]] （+ {{ill|1860|ja|1860|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1860|qq=}} ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Annin|ja|安永|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Annin|qq=}} 8th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1779|ja|1779|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1779|qq=}} [[:en:December 6|December 6]] ） - [[:en:Emperor Go-Momozono|Emperor Go-Taien]] 、118代[[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] （* {{ill|1758|ja|1758|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1758|qq=}} ）

Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月廿九|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 29일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 29''' is the 29th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . If the month is {{Nihongo|Small|小|qq=}} then this is the last day of the month. Otherwise if the month is {{Nihongo|Big|大|qq=}} then it is the second last day.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref> It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|qq=}} .

* [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1720|ja|1720|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1720|qq=}} [[:en:November 28|November 28]] ） - {{ill|Mito Domain|1=Mito Domain|2=ja|3=水戸藩|ja|Mito Domain|1=Mito Domain|2=ja|3=水戸藩|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mito Domain|qq=}} が『[[:en:Dai Nihonshi|Dai-Nihon-shi]] 』250巻を幕府へ献上

Otherwise if the month is {{Nihongo|Big|大|qq=}} then it is the second last day.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref> It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜}} .

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q840175]] Wikidata name: 29th day of the 10th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:42, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|October 29|qq=October 29}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月廿九|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 29일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 29''' is the 29th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . If the month is {{Nihongo|Small|小|qq=}} then this is the last day of the month. Otherwise if the month is {{Nihongo|Big|大|qq=}} then it is the second last day.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref> It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜}} .
== Events ==
* [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1720|1720]] [[:en:November 28|November 28]] ） - [[:en:Mito Domain|Mito Domain]] が『[[:en:Dai Nihonshi|Dai-Nihon-shi]] 』250巻を幕府へ献上
== Births == * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 12nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1815|1815]] [[:en:November 29|November 29]] ） - [[:en:Ii Naosuke|Ii Naosuke]] 、Tokugawa shogunate[[:en:Tairō|Tairō]] （+ [[:en:1860|1860]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Annin|ja|安永|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Annin|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安永 (元号)}} 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1779|1779]] [[:en:December 6|December 6]] ） - [[:en:Emperor Go-Momozono|Emperor Go-Taien]] 、118代[[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] （* [[:en:1758|1758]] ）

Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月廿九|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 29일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 29''' is the 29th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . If the month is {{Nihongo|Small|小|qq=}} then this is the last day of the month. Otherwise if the month is {{Nihongo|Big|大|qq=}} then it is the second last day.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref> It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|qid=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月廿九|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 29일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 29''' is the 29th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . If the month is {{Nihongo|Small|小|qq=}} then this is the last day of the month. Otherwise if the month is {{Nihongo|Big|大|qq=}} then it is the second last day.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref> It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .

== Births == * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 12nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1815|1815]] [[:en:November 29|November 29]] ） - [[:en:Ii Naosuke|Ii Naosuke]] 、Tokugawa shogunate[[:en:Tairō|Tairō]] （+ [[:en:1860|1860]] ）

Otherwise if the month is {{Nihongo|Big|大|qq=}} then it is the second last day.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref> It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events ==

== Births == * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 12nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1815|1815]] [[:en:November 29|November 29]] ） - [[:en:Ii Naosuke|Ii Naosuke]] 、Tokugawa shogunate[[:en:Tairō|Tairō]] （+ [[:en:1860|1860]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Annin|ja|安永|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Annin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安永 (元号)|1=An'ei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1193910}} 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1779|1779]] [[:en:December 6|December 6]] ） - [[:en:Emperor Go-Momozono|Emperor Go-Taien]] 、118代[[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] （* [[:en:1758|1758]] ）

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月廿九|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 29일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 29''' is the 29th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . If the month is {{Nihongo|Small|小|qq=}} then this is the last day of the month. Otherwise if the month is {{Nihongo|Big|大|qq=}} then it is the second last day.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref> It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .

Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月廿九|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 29일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 29''' is the 29th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . If the month is {{Nihongo|Small|小|qq=}} then this is the last day of the month. Otherwise if the month is {{Nihongo|Big|大|qq=}} then it is the second last day.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref> It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events ==
* [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1720|1720]] [[:en:November 28|November 28]] ） - [[:en:Mito Domain|Mito Domain]] が『[[:en:Dai Nihonshi|Dai-Nihon-shi]] 』250巻を幕府へ献上
== Births == * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 12nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1815|1815]] [[:en:November 29|November 29]] ） - [[:en:Ii Naosuke|Ii Naosuke]] 、Tokugawa shogunate[[:en:Tairō|Tairō]] （+ [[:en:1860|1860]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Annin|ja|安永|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Annin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安永 (元号)|1=An'ei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1193910}} 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1779|1779]] [[:en:December 6|December 6]] ） - [[:en:Emperor Go-Momozono|Emperor Go-Taien]] 、118代[[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] （* [[:en:1758|1758]] ）

If the month is {{Nihongo|Small|小|qq=}} then this is the last day of the month. Otherwise if the month is {{Nihongo|Big|大|qq=}} then it is the second last day.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref> It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840|1=tomobiki}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
